verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: By those [angels] who extract with violence
verse.verse_2: And [by] those who remove with ease
verse.verse_3: And [by] those who glide [as if] swimming
verse.verse_4: And those who race each other in a race
verse.verse_6: On the Day the blast [of the Horn] will convulse [creation],
verse.verse_7: There will follow it the subsequent [one].
verse.verse_10: They are [presently] saying, "Will we indeed be returned to [our] former state [of life]?
verse.verse_11: Even if we should be decayed bones?
verse.verse_12: They say, "That, then, would be a losing return."
verse.verse_13: Indeed, it will be but one shout,
verse.verse_14: And suddenly they will be [alert] upon the earth's surface.
verse.verse_15: Has there reached you the story of Moses? -
verse.verse_16: When his Lord called to him in the sacred valley of Tuwa,
verse.verse_17: "Go to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed.
verse.verse_18: And say to him, 'Would you [be willing to] purify yourself
verse.verse_19: And let me guide you to your Lord so you would fear [Him]?'"
verse.verse_20: And he showed him the greatest sign,
verse.verse_22: Then he turned his back, striving.
verse.verse_23: And he gathered [his people] and called out
verse.verse_24: And said, "I am your most exalted lord."
verse.verse_25: So Allah seized him in exemplary punishment for the last and the first [transgression].
verse.verse_26: Indeed in that is a warning for whoever would fear [Allah].
verse.verse_27: Are you a more difficult creation or is the heaven? Allah constructed it.
verse.verse_28: He raised its ceiling and proportioned it.
verse.verse_29: And He darkened its night and extracted its brightness.
verse.verse_30: And after that He spread the earth.
verse.verse_31: He extracted from it its water and its pasture,
verse.verse_32: And the mountains He set firmly
verse.verse_33: As provision for you and your grazing livestock.
verse.verse_34: But when there comes the greatest Overwhelming Calamity -
verse.verse_35: The Day when man will remember that for which he strove,
verse.verse_36: And Hellfire will be exposed for [all] those who see -
verse.verse_37: So as for he who transgressed
verse.verse_38: And preferred the life of the world,
verse.verse_39: Then indeed, Hellfire will be [his] refuge.
verse.verse_40: But as for he who feared the position of his Lord and prevented the soul from [unlawful] inclination,
verse.verse_41: Then indeed, Paradise will be [his] refuge.
verse.verse_42: They ask you, [O Muhammad], about the Hour: when is its arrival?
verse.verse_43: In what [position] are you that you should mention it?
verse.verse_44: To your Lord is its finality.
verse.verse_45: You are only a warner for those who fear it.
verse.verse_46: It will be, on the Day they see it, as though they had not remained [in the world] except for an afternoon or a morning thereof.
